conversation.text: Thanks, son. Your mom really outdid herself.

translations.Somali: Mahadsanid, wiilkayga. Hooyadaa runtii way dadaashay.

conversation.text: How was your day at work?
It was busy, but productive. How about school?

translations.Somali: Way mashquul ahayd, laakiin midho dhalaysa. Iskuulka sidaa tahay?

conversation.text: It was good. We started a new science project.

translations.Somali: Waa fiicnayd. Waxaan bilownay mashruuc saynis cusub.

conversation.text: That sounds interesting. What’s the project about?

translations.Somali: Taasi waxay u muuqataa mid xiiso leh. Mashruucu muxuu ku saabsan yahay?
